parameters.query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.is_active,
       COALESCE(s.current_state,'') AS current_state,
       s.state_data
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN bot_user_states s ON u.telegram_id = s.telegram_id
WHERE u.telegram_id = '{{ $node["Normalize"].json.telegram_id }}'

parameters.text: ⛔ Anda tidak terdaftar atau tidak aktif. Hubungi admin.

parameters.query: SELECT item_code, kode_barang, name_item, quantity, min_threshold FROM stock_gudang WHERE item_code != 'null' ORDER BY item_code ASC
SELECT id, telegram_id, name, role, is_active FROM users ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT u.name, l.item_code, l.quantity, l.tipe, l.status_transaksi, l.created_at
FROM log_transaksi l
JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id
WHERE l.item_code != 'null'
ORDER BY l.id DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT a.id, u.name AS user_name, a.item_code, sg.name_item, a.quantity, a.requested_at
FROM approval_requests a
JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id
JOIN stock_gudang sg ON sg.item_code = a.item_code
WHERE a.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY a.requested_at ASC

SELECT u.name AS user_name, su.item_code, sg.name_item, su.quantity, su.updated_at
FROM stock_users su
JOIN users u ON su.user_id = u.id
JOIN stock_gudang sg ON sg.item_code = su.item_code
WHERE su.quantity > 0 AND su.item_code != 'null'
ORDER BY u.name, su.item_code
SELECT item_code, name_item, quantity FROM stock_gudang WHERE item_code != 'null' ORDER BY item_code ASC

SELECT a.id, a.item_code, sg.name_item, a.quantity, a.status, a.requested_at, a.responded_at
FROM approval_requests a
JOIN users u ON a.user_id = u.id
JOIN stock_gudang sg ON sg.item_code = a.item_code
WHERE u.telegram_id = '{{ $node["Normalize"].json.telegram_id }}'
ORDER BY a.requested_at DESC LIMIT 10

INSERT INTO bot_user_states (telegram_id, current_state) VALUES ('{{ $node["Normalize"].json.telegram_id }}', 'STAFF_ALOKASI_WAIT') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_state='STAFF_ALOKASI_WAIT', state_data=NULL;

parameters.query: INSERT INTO bot_user_states (telegram_id, current_state) VALUES ('{{ $node["Normalize"].json.telegram_id }}', 'ADMIN_ADD_ITEM') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_state='ADMIN_ADD_ITEM', state_data=NULL;

parameters.text:
➕ *TAMBAH ITEM BARU*

Format:
`ITEM_CODE KODE_BARANG "Nama Item" QTY MIN_THRESHOLD`

Contoh:
`SSD2 311209 "SSD Visipro 512GB" 20 5`

Ketik /cancel untuk batal.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO stock_gudang (item_code, kode_barang, name_item, quantity, min_threshold)
VALUES (
  '{{ $items("Parse: Add Item Input")[0].json.item_code }}',
  '{{ $items("Parse: Add Item Input")[0].json.kode_barang }}',
  '{{ $items("Parse: Add Item Input")[0].json.name_item }}',
  {{ $items("Parse: Add Item Input")[0].json.qty }},
  {{ $items("Parse: Add Item Input")[0].json.min_threshold }}
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  kode_barang=VALUES(kode_barang),
  name_item=VALUES(name_item),
  quantity=VALUES(quantity),
  min_threshold=VALUES(min_threshold);
DELETE FROM bot_user_states WHERE telegram_id='{{ $node["Normalize"].json.telegram_id }}';
INSERT INTO log_transaksi (user_id, item_code, quantity, tipe, status_transaksi)
SELECT id, '{{ $items("Parse: Add Item Input")[0].json.item_code }}',
  {{ $items("Parse: Add Item Input")[0].json.qty }}, 'RESTOCK', 'success'
FROM users WHERE telegram_id='{{ $node["Normalize"].json.telegram_id }}';

parameters.query: SELECT telegram_id FROM users WHERE role='admin' AND is_active=1

SELECT su.item_code, sg.name_item, su.quantity, su.updated_at
FROM stock_users su
JOIN stock_gudang sg ON su.item_code = sg.item_code
WHERE su.user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE telegram_id='{{ $node["Normalize"].json.telegram_id }}')
AND su.quantity > 0 AND su.item_code != 'null'
ORDER BY su.item_code

parameters.query:
SELECT u.name AS Nama_User,
       l.item_code AS Kode_Item,
       sg.name_item AS Nama_Item,
       l.quantity AS Qty,
       l.tipe AS Tipe_Transaksi,
       l.status_transaksi AS Status,
       DATE_FORMAT(l.created_at, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i') AS Tanggal
FROM log_transaksi l
JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN stock_gudang sg ON l.item_code = sg.item_code
WHERE l.item_code != 'null'
ORDER BY l.id DESC

SELECT u.name AS Nama_User,
       u.role AS Role,
       su.item_code AS Kode_Item,
       sg.name_item AS Nama_Item,
       su.quantity AS Qty_Dipegang,
       DATE_FORMAT(su.updated_at, '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i') AS Tgl_Update
FROM stock_users su
JOIN users u ON su.user_id = u.id
JOIN stock_gudang sg ON sg.item_code = su.item_code
WHERE su.quantity > 0 AND su.item_code != 'null'
ORDER BY u.name ASC, su.item_code ASC
